notes: --profile is the single runtime configuration selector.
--profile accepts packaged profile IDs and external .yaml/.yml profile files.
--config is removed from the executable CLI metadata, generated contract snapshots, and parser help.
External profile files validate as YAML mappings, require base_profile, reject unknown top-level keys, and compose through ResolvedDeployment.
Profile provenance output reports source kind, profile id, base profile, external path when present, applied override keys, and no-secret redaction status.

verification.command: uv --cache-dir .uv-cache run python -m tigrbl_auth.cli.main serve --check --profile production --format json
uv --cache-dir .uv-cache run python -m tigrbl_auth.cli.main serve --check --profile .\tests\fixtures\profiles\external-production.yaml --format json
uv --cache-dir .uv-cache run python -m tigrbl_auth.cli.main discovery show --profile .\tests\fixtures\profiles\external-production.yaml --format json
